channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged street light, 27th June
item.description:
Damaged street light
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every weekend, Parking on pedestrian pavement, 27th June
item.description:
Every weekend, users of The George Staples pub, or nightclub as it now seems to be, are double parking outside Woodman House, meaning pedestrians have to step into the busy main road. This goes unchecked every Friday and when there is an event on.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 273, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post light not working, 27th June
item.description:
Outside 59 Gloucester Avenue the lamp post has stopped working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 179, Longlands Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big metal pole in the playground, 27th June
item.description:
As per title

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glebe Knoll, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between entrance of Pilgrims Lane and 36 Roslyn hill on Roslyn Hill, 27th June
item.description:
A18 year old boy sustained serious head injuries. He was driving down Roslyn Hill on Friday 26.06 shortly before midnight. I believe he lost control over his bike when hitting the pothole leading to a very serious fall with severe head injuries. He was taken to the emergency unit at the Royal Free. As no police was present, I feel it is essential that the council is notified!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Rosslyn Hill, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Beckenham Rec this evening, 27th June
item.description:
Large groups having picnics/bbqs and not taking litter home with them just leaving by full bin. Can we start fining people who leave litter in the rec?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitmore Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Syringes and needles in common areas., 27th June
item.description:
A large amount of syringes and needles were found under the stair in 22 -41 Swinford Gardens. Can you please safely remove before someone get pricked. Thanks. Nicolas

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barrington Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Again black bag's on the grass area outside 13 Hilversum Crescent, 27th June
item.description:
Ongoing problem in this area, grass area people turn in the rubbish bin, estate offiser don't care,not investigated,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hilversum Crescent, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please grind out this stump so it can be replanted next season, 27th June
item.description:
Please grind out this stump so it can be replanted asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walden Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furlong Road massive pothole near Holloway Road junction, 27th June
item.description:
Super deep, really dangerous for cyclists going along carriageway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Furlong Road, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two foxes hit by a car and left in road, 27th June
item.description:
Two foxes have ben hit by car, they have been moved from road to the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eversley Avenue, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering in bushes, 27th June
item.description:
People passing by are always littering. Please can you put a bin in the area. We have requested this previously and nothing was done. The littering is just getting worse and worse.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunnock Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Winchester and Salusbury Rd, 27th June
item.description:
There is a food waste bin on the corner. It smells absolutely disgusting and there are flies buzzing round. It clearly needs emptying and, ideally, cleaning
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Street bin needs emptying

item.title: Rubbish bin needed for bus stop outside 66/68 Hythe Avenue, 27th June
item.description:
I have lived on the street for nearly 12 years and I have been picking up litter on a near daily basis. If I am away the rubbish/litter will be blocking the drain and the area is prone to flooding. There is a yellow bin on the bus stop opposite outside 57/59 Hythe Avenue. A bin would be greatly appreciated and I believe this is a reasonable request. It will help keep the area tidy and picking up the litter is becoming a nuisance. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hythe Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering, 27th June
item.description:
The lady opened the bag of rubbish all over the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Okehampton Crescent, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at the bus stop, 27th June
item.description:
There is always rubbish left outside this bus stop. Today a whole sofa. Previously have seen mattress when i waited at the bus stop. These are not item people need to throw when waiting for a bus. It is clear its fly tipping and its not nice for the people living by the bus stop.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter at the planters on Tabard Street, 27th June
item.description:
There is a black rubbish bag and a plastic bottle at the planters on Tabard street. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pilgrimage Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rosendale Road SE21 8EZ outside number 103 tree –, 27th June
item.description:
Rosendale Road SE21 8EZ outside number 103 tree – two bows partly torn from trunk of tree. Need lopping off cleanly and removed. See attached picture. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rosendale Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th June
item.description:
Fly tipped fridge packaging including polystyrene, and other household rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridge Close, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike parking bay, 27th June
item.description:
Ever since this lime bike parking bay has been here it's caused nothing but stress for residents and cars driving on Silverthorne road sw8 3ad! It needs to be removed. Nuisance, inconsiderate riders leave their bikes in front of residents gates, blocking pavements without a care in the world! Please remove this parking bay! It's dangerous and maybe times bikes are just lying in the road!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silverthorne Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
